sql_safety.text: No SQL queries present. Pure configuration array builder.

security.text: No user input handled. Returns static config data. Safe.

performance.text: Uses lazy-loading pattern (caches in $this->subtab_data). Reasonable.

wp_api_usage.text: Correct use of __( ) for i18n on label string. Standard WP pattern.

code_quality.text: Heavy use of tabs with inconsistent spacing. Multiple blank lines. Code works but formatting is messy.

dependency_integrity.text: No external dependencies. Self-contained config object.

i18n.text: Label string correctly wrapped in __( ). Domain 'a3-responsive-slider' used consistently.

accessibility.text: Admin config data. No direct UI impact.

reasoning.key_observation: Simple lazy-loaded config array builder with proper i18n but messy whitespace.

security.text: No user input. Array type check is defensive. Safe.

performance.text: O(1) append operation. Minimal overhead.

wp_api_usage.text: Standard WP callback registration pattern. No WP API issues.

code_quality.text: Type guard on $subtabs_array is good practice. Clean logic but whitespace inconsistencies.

wpcs_compliance.text: Direct $GLOBALS access is non-standard WP pattern. Should use wp_verify_nonce or proper object injection.

security.text: GLOBALS access is risky — depends on $this->plugin_prefix being trusted. If plugin_prefix is attacker-controlled, this is arbitrary object access.

performance.text: Delegates to admin_forms method. No local perf concerns.

wp_api_usage.text: GLOBALS access bypasses WP dependency injection. Should use a container or class property set in __construct.

code_quality.text: GLOBALS coupling is a code smell. String concatenation for key lookup is fragile.

dependency_integrity.text: Hard dependency on $GLOBALS key existence. Will fail if admin_interface not registered.

i18n.text: No translatable strings in this function.

accessibility.text: Admin UI rendering. No direct accessibility concerns.

reasoning.key_observation: GLOBALS coupling is a structural weakness — fragile dependency access pattern.

code:
function init_form_fields() {
				
  		// Define settings			
     	$this->form_fields = apply_filters( $this->option_name . '_settings_fields', array(
			
			array(
				'name'		=> __( 'Next / Previous Icons', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
                'type' 		=> 'heading',
           	),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Control Arrow Icons', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'enable_slider_control',
				'class'		=> 'enable_slider_control',
				'type' 		=> 'onoff_checkbox',
				'default'	=> 1,
				'checked_value'		=> 1,
				'unchecked_value' 	=> 0,
				'checked_label'		=> __( 'ON', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'unchecked_label' 	=> __( 'OFF', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
			),
			
			array(
                'type' 		=> 'heading',
				'class'		=> 'slider_control_container'
           	),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Arrows Display', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'slider_control_transition',
				'type' 		=> 'onoff_radio',
				'class'		=> 'slider_control_transition',
				'default' 	=> 'hover',
				'onoff_options' => array(
					array(
						'val' 				=> 'alway',
						'text' 				=> __( 'Alway show when slider loaded', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
						'checked_label'		=> __( 'ON', 'a3-responsive-slider' ) ,
						'unchecked_label' 	=> __( 'OFF', 'a3-responsive-slider' ) ,
					),
					array(
						'val' 				=> 'hover',
						'text' 				=> __( 'Show when hover on slider container', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
						'checked_label'		=> __( 'ON', 'a3-responsive-slider' ) ,
						'unchecked_label' 	=> __( 'OFF', 'a3-responsive-slider' ) ,
				),
				),			
			),
			array(
				'name' => __( 'Icons Size', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc' 		=> "px",
				'id' 		=> 'slider_control_icons_size',
				'type' 		=> 'slider',
				'default'	=> 30,
				'min'		=> 10,
				'max'		=> 60,
				'increment'	=> 1,
			),
			array(
				'name' 		=> __( 'Icons Colour', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'slider_control_icons_color',
				'type' 		=> 'color',
				'default'	=> '#000000'
			),
			array(
				'name' => __( 'Icons Transparency', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc' 		=> "%. " . __( '100% = Full Colour', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'slider_control_icons_opacity',
				'type' 		=> 'slider',
				'default'	=> 60,
				'min'		=> 0,
				'max'		=> 100,
				'increment'	=> 10,
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Previous Icon Left Margin', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc'		=> 'px',
				'id' 		=> 'control_previous_icon_margin_left',
				'type' 		=> 'text',
				'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
				'default'	=> 5,
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Next Icon Right Margin', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc'		=> 'px',
				'id' 		=> 'control_next_icon_margin_right',
				'type' 		=> 'text',
				'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
				'default'	=> 5,
			),

			array(
				'name'   => __('Pause | Play Icons', 'a3-responsive-slider'),
				'type'   => 'heading',
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Icon Display', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'pauseplay_icon_transition',
				'type' 		=> 'onoff_radio',
				'class'		=> 'pauseplay_icon_transition',
				'default' 	=> 'hover',
				'onoff_options' => array(
					array(
						'val' 				=> 'alway',
						'text' 				=> __( 'Alway show when slider loaded', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
						'checked_label'		=> __( 'ON', 'a3-responsive-slider' ) ,
						'unchecked_label' 	=> __( 'OFF', 'a3-responsive-slider' ) ,
					),
					array(
						'val' 				=> 'hover',
						'text' 				=> __( 'Show when hover on slider container', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
						'checked_label'		=> __( 'ON', 'a3-responsive-slider' ) ,
						'unchecked_label' 	=> __( 'OFF', 'a3-responsive-slider' ) ,
				),
				),			
			),
			array(
				'name' => __( 'Icons Size', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc' 		=> "px",
				'id' 		=> 'pauseplay_icon_size',
				'type' 		=> 'slider',
				'default'	=> 30,
				'min'		=> 10,
				'max'		=> 60,
				'increment'	=> 1,
			),
			array(
				'name' 		=> __( 'Icons Colour', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'pauseplay_icon_color',
				'type' 		=> 'color',
				'default'	=> '#000000'
			),
			array(
				'name' => __( 'Icons Transparency', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc' 		=> "%. " . __( '100% = Full Colour', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'pauseplay_icon_opacity',
				'type' 		=> 'slider',
				'default'	=> 60,
				'min'		=> 0,
				'max'		=> 100,
				'increment'	=> 10,
			),
			array(
				'name' => __( 'Vertical Position', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc' 		=> '',
				'id' 		=> 'pauseplay_icon_vertical_position',
				'default'	=> 'center',
				'type' 		=> 'onoff_radio',
				'onoff_options' => array(
					array(
						'val' => 'top',
						'text' => __( 'Top', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
						'checked_label'	=> 'ON',
						'unchecked_label' => 'OFF',
					),
					array(
						'val' => 'center',
						'text' => __( 'Middle', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
						'checked_label'	=> 'ON',
						'unchecked_label' => 'OFF',
					),
					array(
						'val' => 'bottom',
						'text' => __( 'Bottom', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
						'checked_label'	=> 'ON',
						'unchecked_label' => 'OFF',
				),
			),
			array(
				'name' => __( 'Horizontal Position', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc' 		=> '',
				'id' 		=> 'pauseplay_icon_horizontal_position',
				'default'	=> 'center',
				'type' 		=> 'onoff_radio',
				'onoff_options' => array(
					array(
						'val' => 'left',
						'text' => __( 'Left', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
						'checked_label'	=> 'ON',
						'unchecked_label' => 'OFF',
					),
					array(
						'val' => 'center',
						'text' => __( 'Center', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
						'checked_label'	=> 'ON',
						'unchecked_label' => 'OFF',
					),
					array(
						'val' => 'right',
						'text' => __( 'Right', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
						'checked_label'	=> 'ON',
						'unchecked_label' => 'OFF',
					),
				),
			),
        ));
	}

wpcs_compliance.text: Extensive formatting issues: mixed tabs/spaces, inconsistent array alignment, trailing commas, and missing WP coding standard braces on control structures.

sql_safety.text: No SQL. Pure form field definition.

security.text: Color inputs ('#000000') need sanitization on output. desc text uses hardcoded 'px' strings not wrapped in __().

performance.text: Large inline array (196 lines) in init function. Memory load on every page load. No lazy loading of form fields.

wp_api_usage.text: Uses apply_filters correctly for extensibility. However, hardcoded 'px' and '%' desc strings should use __(). The filter name uses $this->option_name which is correct.

code_quality.text: Massive inline array with heavy nesting. Typos: 'alway' instead of 'always'. desc text uses string concat with 'px' not wrapped in __( ). Hardcoded CSS in css key is poor separation of concerns.

dependency_integrity.text: No external deps. Self-contained form field definitions.

i18n.text: Most labels use __( ) but hardcoded 'px', '%.', 'ON', 'OFF' strings in some places are not all wrapped. desc='px' and desc='%. ' should be translatable.

accessibility.text: Form fields define UI controls but no aria-labels, no keyboard navigation attributes. onoff_radio type lacks visible labels for screen readers.

reasoning.key_observation: Massive form field definition with typos ('alway'), non-i18n strings ('px'), and poor code quality.

wpcs_compliance.text: Inline JavaScript in PHP file violates WP coding standards. Should use wp_enqueue_script with localized data.

security.text: Direct .attr('style',...) is low-risk but bypasses CSS classes. No nonce/check needed since this is admin JS.

performance.text: Inline script loads on every admin page. Should be enqueued conditionally. jQuery dependency loaded but not deferred.

wp_api_usage.text: Major WP API violation: inline script instead of wp_enqueue_script/wp_add_inline_script. Should not use PHP echo/short tags for JS.

code_quality.text: IIFE pattern is good. Uses jQuery proxy correctly. But inline JS in PHP is anti-pattern. Missing strict mode.

dependency_integrity.text: Depends on jQuery being available. Admin context likely has jQuery but not guaranteed.

i18n.text: No translatable strings in JS.

accessibility.text: Toggles visibility but doesn't manage aria-expanded or tabindex. Screen readers won't know controls are hidden.

reasoning.key_observation: Inline JS in PHP is a WP API violation — should use wp_enqueue_script with localized data.

wpcs_compliance.text: Standard WP action hook patterns. Inconsistent spacing in add_action args.

sql_safety.text: No SQL. Constructor with hook registration only.

security.text: No user input. Hook registration is safe. form_messages are static strings.

performance.text: Constructor does minimal work. Hook registration is O(1). No issues.

wp_api_usage.text: Correct use of add_action for WP hooks. plugin_loaded priority 1 is correct. Dynamic hook names built from class properties.

code_quality.text: Clean constructor pattern. Commented-out get_settings action is dead code that should be removed. Inconsistent spacing.

dependency_integrity.text: Relies on $this->plugin_name, $this->form_key being set before construction. Standard WP plugin pattern.

i18n.text: form_messages use __( ) correctly. 'reseted' is grammatically incorrect — should be 'reset' for better i18n.

accessibility.text: Admin constructor. No direct UI impact.

reasoning.key_observation: Standard WP constructor pattern with correct hook registration but grammatical error ('reseted').

wpcs_compliance.text: Clean WP filter pattern. Minimal code.

security.text: No user input. Filter registration only.

performance.text: O(1) filter registration. No overhead.

wp_api_usage.text: Correct add_filter usage with dynamic hook name. Standard WP extensibility pattern.

code_quality.text: Simple, focused function. One-liner body. Clean.

dependency_integrity.text: Depends on $this->plugin_name, $this->parent_tab, $this->position being initialized. Standard pattern.

i18n.text: No translatable strings.

accessibility.text: Admin internals. No UI impact.

reasoning.key_observation: Clean one-line filter registration — standard WP extensibility pattern.

security.text: Static config data. No user input.

i18n.text: Label correctly wrapped in __( ). Domain correct.

accessibility.text: Admin config. No UI impact.

function init_form_fields() {
				
  		// Define settings			
     	$this->form_fields = apply_filters( $this->option_name . '_settings_fields', array(
			
			array(
				'name'		=> __( 'Pager Settings', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
                'type' 		=> 'heading',
           	),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Slider Pager', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'enable_slider_pager',
				'class'		=> 'enable_slider_pager',
				'type' 		=> 'onoff_checkbox',
				'default'	=> 1,
				'checked_value'		=> 1,
				'unchecked_value' 	=> 0,
				'checked_label'		=> __( 'ON', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'unchecked_label' 	=> __( 'OFF', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
			),
			
			array(
                'type' 		=> 'heading',
				'class'		=> 'slider_pager_container'
           	),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Pager Position', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'slider_pager_position',
				'type' 		=> 'select',
				'default'	=> 'bottom-right',
				'options'	=> array(
					'top-left'		=> __( 'Top Left', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
					'top-center'	=> __( 'Top Center', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
					'top-right'		=> __( 'Top Right', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
					'bottom-left'	=> __( 'Bottom Left', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
					'bottom-center'	=> __( 'Bottom Center', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
					'bottom-right'	=> __( 'Bottom Right', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				),
				'css' 		=> 'width:160px;',
			),
			
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Pager Container Padding', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'pager_container_padding',
				'type' 		=> 'array_textfields',
				'ids'		=> array( 
	 								array( 
											'id' 		=> 'pager_container_padding_top',
	 										'name' 		=> __( 'Top', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
	 										'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
	 										'default'	=> 2 ),
	 
	 								array(  'id' 		=> 'pager_container_padding_bottom',
	 										'name' 		=> __( 'Bottom', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
	 										'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
	 										'default'	=> 2 ),
											
									array( 
											'id' 		=> 'pager_container_padding_left',
	 										'name' 		=> __( 'Left', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
	 										'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
	 										'default'	=> 5 ),
											
									array( 
											'id' 		=> 'pager_container_padding_right',
	 										'name' 		=> __( 'Right', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
	 										'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
	 										'default'	=> 5 ),
	 							)
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Pager Container Background Colour', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc' 		=> __( 'Default', 'a3-responsive-slider' ) . ' [default_value]',
				'id' 		=> 'pager_background_colour',
				'type' 		=> 'color',
				'default'	=> '#000000'
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Pager Container Background Transparency', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc'		=> __( 'Scale - 0 = 100% transparent - 100 = 100% Solid Colour.', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'pager_background_transparency',
				'type' 		=> 'slider',
				'default'	=> 60,
				'min'		=> 0,
				'max'		=> 100,
				'increment'	=> 10,
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Pager Container Border', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'pager_border',
				'type' 		=> 'border',
				'default'	=> array( 'width' => '0px', 'style' => 'solid', 'color' => '#000000', 'corner' => 'rounded' , 'rounded_value' => 10 )
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Pager Container Shadow', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'pager_shadow',
				'type' 		=> 'box_shadow',
				'default'	=> array( 'enable' => 0, 'h_shadow' => '5px' , 'v_shadow' => '5px', 'blur' => '2px' , 'spread' => '2px', 'color' => '#DBDBDB', 'inset' => '' )
			),
			
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Pager Font', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'pager_font',
				'type' 		=> 'typography',
				'default'	=> array( 'size' => '11px', 'line_height' => '1.4em', 'face' => 'Arial, sans-serif', 'style' => 'normal', 'color' => '#FFFFFF' )
			),
        ));
	}

wpcs_compliance.text: Massive inline array. Inconsistent spacing. desc='[default_value]' not wrapped in __( ). CSS inline on select field.

security.text: Color picker default '#000000' should be sanitized on save. desc text partially i18n'd but '[default_value]' literal leaked.

performance.text: Large array (109 lines) loaded every init. select with 6 hardcoded option values — could use a config source.

wp_api_usage.text: apply_filters used correctly. But hardcoded 'width:160px;' CSS in field def is poor. String concat on desc with literal '[default_value]' breaks i18n.

code_quality.text: 109-line inline array. desc='__. "Default" . " [default_value]"' pattern is fragile for translation. Inconsistent nesting.

dependency_integrity.text: No external deps. Form fields self-contained.

i18n.text: Most labels use __( ) but desc='[default_value]' is a leaked literal. Some desc strings not wrapped. 'Colour' is UK English — should be handled by locale.

accessibility.text: Select dropdown options are translatable but no aria-labels. Color picker has no keyboard alternative.

reasoning.key_observation: Large form fields with leaked literal '[default_value]' and partial i18n compliance issues.

wpcs_compliance.text: Inline JS in PHP — same WP API violation as Control::include_script. Should use wp_enqueue_script.

security.text: Inline JS. The document.on handler targets '.enable_slider_control' but the function name is for pager — selector mismatch bug means events fire on wrong elements.

performance.text: Inline script on every page. jQuery dependency. The double-setter on .css() after .hide() is redundant.

wp_api_usage.text: Major WP API violation: inline script. Also selector bug: uses '.enable_slider_control' instead of '.enable_slider_pager'.

code_quality.text: Selector mismatch: pager JS listens on '.enable_slider_control' (wrong class). Double CSS application is wasteful. IIFE is correct.

dependency_integrity.text: jQuery dependency. Global event handler on $(document).

i18n.text: No strings in JS.

accessibility.text: Toggles visibility without aria attributes. Screen readers unaware of state changes.

reasoning.key_observation: Inline JS plus selector mismatch bug — listens on '.enable_slider_control' instead of pager selector.

wp_api_usage.text: Correct add_action usage. plugin_loaded priority 1 is proper.

dependency_integrity.text: Relies on $this->plugin_name, $this->form_key initialization.

i18n.text: Message strings use __( ) correctly. Same grammatical issue: 'reseted' should be 'reset'.

accessibility.text: Admin constructor. No UI impact.

reasoning.key_observation: Exact Pager constructor pattern duplicated — same grammatical error ('reseted') and DRY violation.

wp_api_usage.text: GLOBALS bypass. All three classes repeat this exact anti-pattern.

code_quality.text: Third exact copy of settings_form. Should be in shared base class. Severe DRY violation.

dependency_integrity.text: GLOBALS dependency. Three copies mean three places to update if admin_interface changes.

i18n.text: No strings.

accessibility.text: Admin UI rendering.

reasoning.key_observation: Third exact copy of GLOBALS-based settings_form — severe DRY violation across three classes.

code:
function init_form_fields() {
				
  		// Define settings			
     	$this->form_fields = apply_filters( $this->option_name . '_settings_fields', array(
			
			array(
				'name'		=> __( 'Image Caption Settings', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
                'type' 		=> 'heading',
           	),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Caption', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'enable_slider_caption',
				'class'		=> 'enable_slider_caption',
				'type' 		=> 'onoff_checkbox',
				'default'	=> 1,
				'checked_value'		=> 1,
				'unchecked_value' 	=> 0,
				'checked_label'		=> __( 'ON', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'unchecked_label' 	=> __( 'OFF', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
			),
			
			array(
                'type' 		=> 'heading',
				'class'		=> 'slider_caption_container'
           	),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Caption Margin', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'caption_margin',
				'type' 		=> 'array_textfields',
				'ids'		=> array( 
	 								array( 
											'id' 		=> 'caption_margin_top',
	 										'name' 		=> __( 'Top', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
	 										'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
	 										'default'	=> 10 ),
	 
	 								array(  'id' 		=> 'caption_margin_bottom',
	 										'name' 		=> __( 'Bottom', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
	 										'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
	 										'default'	=> 5 ),
											
									array( 
											'id' 		=> 'caption_margin_left',
	 										'name' 		=> __( 'Left', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
	 										'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
	 										'default'	=> 10 ),
											
									array( 
											'id' 		=> 'caption_margin_right',
	 										'name' 		=> __( 'Right', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
	 										'css'		=> 'width:40px;',
	 										'default'	=> 10 ),
	 							)
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Caption Lenght', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'desc'		=> __( 'characters', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'caption_lenght',
				'type' 		=> 'text',
				'default'	=> 200,
				'css'		=> 'width:60px;'
			),
			array(  
				'name' 		=> __( 'Caption Font', 'a3-responsive-slider' ),
				'id' 		=> 'caption_font',
				'type' 		=> 'typography',
				'default'	=> array( 'size' => '12px', 'line_height' => '1.4em', 'face' => 'Arial, sans-serif', 'style' => 'normal', 'color' => '#666666' )
			),
			
        ));
	}

wpcs_compliance.text: Inline array formatting issues. Hardcoded CSS in field defs. desc not always i18n'd consistently.

security.text: Typography and color config are safe. Text input for length needs sanitization on save.

performance.text: 71-line inline array. Acceptable for config but no lazy loading of form fields.

wp_api_usage.text: apply_filters used correctly. CSS hardcoded in field def is not ideal. id='caption_lenght' has a typo.

code_quality.text: id='caption_lenght' is a typo (should be 'length'). desc uses __( ) correctly this time. Inline CSS in 'css' key. Similar pattern to other init_form_fields.

dependency_integrity.text: Self-contained form field definitions. No external deps.

i18n.text: Labels use __( ) correctly. But the id attribute 'caption_lenght' has a typo — this leaks to database and HTML. desc='__("characters")' is correct here (unlike earlier 'px' leaks).

accessibility.text: Typography field has no keyboard access. No aria-labels on form fields.

reasoning.key_observation: Form fields with id='caption_lenght' typo (length), inline CSS, and similar pattern issues to other init functions.

wpcs_compliance.text: Inline JS in PHP — WP API violation. Same as other include_script functions.

security.text: Inline JS. The event handler selects '.slider_pager_container' in the slideDown/slideUp — CLASS BUG. Caption JS should manipulate '.slider_caption_container' not '.slider_pager_container'.

performance.text: Inline script. Double CSS setter is wasteful. Selector bug means wrong DOM elements are animated.

wp_api_usage.text: Inline JS violation. Critical bug: slideDown/slideUp target '.slider_pager_container' instead of '.slider_caption_container' — caption JS controls pager elements.

code_quality.text: Critical selector bug: caption include_script slides pager container instead of caption container. This is a copy-paste error from Pager. Inline JS anti-pattern.

dependency_integrity.text: jQuery dependency. Wrong selector means wrong DOM elements affected.

i18n.text: No strings in JS.

accessibility.text: Visibility toggle without aria. Wrong element selection means caption state not reflected in UI.

reasoning.key_observation: Critical copy-paste bug: caption JS slides pager container — wrong DOM selector in event handler.

wpcs_compliance.text: Standard WP hook registration pattern. Same template as Pager and Caption constructors.

security.text: No user input. Static hook registration.

performance.text: Minimal constructor. O(1) hook registration.

wp_api_usage.text: Correct add_action for WP hooks. plugin_loaded priority 1 is proper.

code_quality.text: Fourth copy of identical constructor pattern. Only message strings differ. Should use base class or factory pattern.

dependency_integrity.text: Requires $this->plugin_name, $this->form_key initialized.

i18n.text: Message strings use __( ) correctly. Same 'reseted' grammatical error.

accessibility.text: Admin constructor. No UI impact.

reasoning.key_observation: Fourth constructor copy in template — same WP hook pattern with identical 'reseted' grammar error.
